Preparative Chromatography Column Packing: Lab to Process Scale
Organization:
North Carolina State University
Department:
Biomanufacturing Training and Education Center (BTEC)
NIIMBL Funded:
No
Type:
Professional Development / Training
Relevant Technologies:
Chromatography;Bioprocessing – Downstream
Delivery Modalities:
Classroom;Hands-on/Laboratory
Type of Enterprise:
Academic
Contact:
shodge@ncsu.edu
Duration:
0-1 Week
Description:
Designed for biotechnology, pharmaceutical, and biopharma downstream processing professionals, this course will explain and demonstrate the factors that influence column packing from both a theoretical and hands-on perspective.
